title: Issue with button automation

posts.author: longlive289s (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml:
I currently have a template with a button setup to move an item from a board to another board with the following automation

When button clicked / duplicate the item / and move item to board

However, when the template is used and the button clicked, the button acts as if it hasn’t been setup even though it does show their is a workflow/automation with that board

image584×562 35.8 KB

If I click the “set up” button it takes me to the workflow setup of the button showing the actual automation

image659×626 23.9 KB

If I don’t do anything and just click “back to automation” and close out of the workflow center, the button then works just fine. Any help?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @longlive289s

I’m afraid this is a known monday issue. Same when you create a button webhook from the API. Thu UI does not “see” that the button is setup.
